journeys.name: Login as athlete for settings tests
journeys.description: Authenticate as athlete user and verify redirect to dashboard

journeys.name: Settings page heading visible
journeys.description: Navigate to /settings and verify the Settings heading renders

journeys.name: Settings page no bad text
journeys.description: Verify settings page has no error text, undefined values, or broken content

journeys.name: Settings Notifications card link present
journeys.description: Verify the Notifications card is a link with href containing /settings/notifications

steps.value: Manage email and push notification preferences

journeys.name: Settings Profile card disabled with Soon badge
journeys.description: Verify Profile settings card is disabled and shows a Soon badge

journeys.name: Settings Security card disabled with Soon badge
journeys.description: Verify Security settings card shows disabled state with Soon badge

journeys.name: Settings Appearance card disabled with Soon badge
journeys.description: Verify Appearance settings card shows disabled state with Soon badge

journeys.name: Settings Notifications link navigates to notifications page
journeys.description: Click the Notifications card link and verify navigation to /settings/notifications

journeys.name: Notification Settings heading visible
journeys.description: Navigate to /settings/notifications and verify the page heading renders

journeys.name: Notification Settings no bad text
journeys.description: Verify notification settings page has no error text or broken content

journeys.name: Push Notifications section heading visible
journeys.description: Verify the Push Notifications section heading is rendered in the notifications page

journeys.name: Push Notifications Profile Views toggle visible
journeys.description: Verify the Profile Views toggle row is visible in Push Notifications section

steps.value: Notify when a scout or coach views a prospect profile

journeys.name: Push Notifications New Offers toggle visible
journeys.description: Verify the New Offers toggle row is visible in Push Notifications section

steps.value: Instant alerts when an athlete in your watchlist receives a scholarship offer

journeys.name: Push Notifications Shortlist Activity toggle visible
journeys.description: Verify the Shortlist Activity toggle row is visible in Push Notifications section

steps.value: Updates on movement within your recruitment shortlist

journeys.name: Push Notifications Messages toggle visible
journeys.description: Verify the Messages toggle row is visible in Push Notifications section

steps.value: Direct notifications for internal staff messages

journeys.name: Push Notifications Calendar Reminders toggle visible
journeys.description: Verify the Calendar Reminders toggle row is visible in Push Notifications section

steps.value: Alerts for scheduled visits, calls, and evaluation deadlines

journeys.name: Toggle click changes toggle state
journeys.description: Click a push notification toggle checkbox and verify it changes checked state

journeys.name: Email Notifications section heading visible
journeys.description: Verify the Email Notifications section heading is rendered

journeys.name: Email Recruiting Intelligence Digest select visible
journeys.description: Verify the Recruiting Intelligence Digest row and frequency select dropdown are rendered

journeys.name: Email digest frequency select has correct options
journeys.description: Verify the digest frequency select contains Daily, Weekly, Monthly, and Never options

journeys.name: Email Important Deadlines toggle visible
journeys.description: Verify the Important Deadlines toggle row is visible in Email Notifications section

journeys.name: Email Marketing and Tips toggle visible
journeys.description: Verify the Marketing and Tips toggle row is visible in Email Notifications section

journeys.name: In-App Notifications section heading visible
journeys.description: Verify the In-App Notifications section heading is rendered

journeys.name: In-App Badge Count toggle visible
journeys.description: Verify the Badge Count toggle row is visible in In-App Notifications section

steps.value: Show notification count on the sidebar

journeys.name: In-App System Sounds toggle visible
journeys.description: Verify the System Sounds toggle row is visible in In-App Notifications section

steps.value: Play a subtle sound when a new alert arrives

journeys.name: Quiet Hours section heading visible
journeys.description: Verify the Quiet Hours section heading is rendered

journeys.name: Quiet Hours time inputs present
journeys.description: Verify the Quiet Hours section has From and To time input fields

journeys.name: Unsaved changes triggers save bar with Discard and Save Changes
journeys.description: Toggle a preference to trigger unsaved changes, then verify the save bar appears with Discard and Save Changes buttons

journeys.name: Discard button click reverts unsaved changes
journeys.description: Toggle a preference, then click Discard button and verify save bar disappears

journeys.name: Save Changes button click saves preferences
journeys.description: Toggle a preference, then click Save Changes button and verify the save action completes

journeys.name: Help Center heading visible
journeys.description: Navigate to /help and verify the Help Center heading renders

journeys.name: Help Center no bad text
journeys.description: Verify help center page has no error text or broken content

journeys.name: Help Center 6 FAQ items present
journeys.description: Verify the help center renders all 6 FAQ items as details elements

steps.value: How do I create my athlete profile?
How does messaging work on RepMax?
How do I upload highlight film?
What features are included in each subscription plan?
How do I cancel my subscription?
How is my data stored and protected?

journeys.name: Help Center FAQ click expands answer
journeys.description: Click the first FAQ summary and verify the answer content expands and becomes visible

steps.value: After signing up, navigate to your dashboard

journeys.name: Help Center FAQ topics cover key areas
journeys.description: Verify FAQ topics span athlete profile, messaging, highlight film, and subscription

journeys.name: Help Center Contact Support email link present
journeys.description: Verify the Contact Support link is a mailto link to support@repmax.io

journeys.name: Pricing page loads with plans (authenticated)
journeys.description: Navigate to /pricing while authenticated and verify the pricing page renders with plan cards

journeys.name: Pricing Athletes tab default with Basic plan
journeys.description: Verify the Athletes tab is shown by default for an athlete user and the Basic plan is visible

journeys.name: Pricing Go Pro button visible
journeys.description: Verify the Go Pro CTA button is visible on the Athletes tab

journeys.name: Pricing Go Pro button click triggers checkout or loading
journeys.description: Click the Go Pro button and verify it shows loading state or triggers checkout redirect

journeys.name: Pricing Recruiters tab shows Enterprise plan
journeys.description: Switch to the Recruiters tab and verify the Enterprise plan with Contact Sales CTA is visible

journeys.name: Pricing Dashr tab shows one-time products
journeys.description: Switch to the Dashr tab and verify one-time purchase products are shown
